items.name: Overseer War Helmet of Dark eyes
items.description: This helmet of the ancient view of Overseer was dug up by an archaeologist Lindix, and after this find, Lindix decided to send it to his old friend for examination, found out that the helmet had a Korblox imprint on it, and these 2 ancient view were fighting for 7 shards called Badge, and who knows what else our archaeologist Lindix will be able to find...
